questions.question: What are the two arguments a functional component function receives?
options: props and a context object with slots, emit, and attrs

questions.question: In Vue 3, why is the performance advantage of functional components over stateful components negligible?
options: Vue 3 disabled functional components to simplify the API
Functional components now use the same instance creation as stateful ones
Vue 3 optimized stateful components heavily with faster instance creation and compiler optimizations
Both types now use the same Proxy-based rendering pipeline

questions.question: Which features do functional components support that stateful (SFC) components also support?
